name: Veg Burger
description: Crispy vegetable patty with fresh lettuce, tomato, and special sauce in a toasted bun.

name: Cheese Burger
description: Juicy grilled patty topped with melted cheddar cheese, pickles, and signature mayo.

name: Chicken Burger
description: Crispy fried chicken fillet with coleslaw, pickles, and smoky barbecue sauce.

name: Paneer Burger
description: Grilled paneer patty with mint chutney, onions, and soft sesame bun.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic thin crust pizza with tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, and basil leaves.

name: Farmhouse Pizza
description: Loaded with bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, olives, and extra cheese on a crisp base.

name: Pepperoni Pizza
description: Spicy pepperoni slices on a cheesy tomato base with herbs and olive oil drizzle.

name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
description: Smoky barbecue chicken, red onions, and mozzarella on a golden crust.

name: French Fries
description: Golden crispy fries seasoned with herbs and served with tangy ketchup.

name: Grilled Sandwich
description: Grilled sandwich stuffed with vegetables, cheese, and herbs on artisan bread.

name: Creamy Pasta
description: Creamy Alfredo pasta tossed with herbs, garlic, and parmesan cheese.

name: Garlic Bread
description: Buttery toasted bread loaded with garlic, parsley, and melted cheese.

name: Onion Rings
description: Crunchy battered onion rings served hot with spicy mayo dip.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Chilled blended coffee with milk, ice, and a touch of vanilla sweetness.

name: Coke
description: Ice-cold cola served chilled for the perfect refreshment.

name: Lemon Iced Tea
description: Refreshing brewed tea with fresh lemon, ice, and a hint of mint.

name: Mango Shake
description: Thick Alphonso mango shake blended with milk and topped with cream.

name: Fresh Lime Soda
description: Sparkling soda with fresh lime juice, salt, and crushed ice.

name: Chocolate Cake
description: Rich layered chocolate cake with ganache frosting and cocoa dust.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft milk dumplings soaked in warm cardamom sugar syrup.

name: Ice Cream Sundae
description: Vanilla ice cream topped with chocolate sauce, nuts, and a cherry.

name: Glazed Donut
description: Fluffy ring donut with glossy sugar glaze and a light vanilla finish.
